indexes.indexdef: CREATE INDEX idx_leads_agent_id ON public.leads USING btree (agent_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_area_id ON public.leads USING btree (area_id) WHERE (area_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_building_id ON public.leads USING btree (building_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_community_id ON public.leads USING btree (community_id) WHERE (community_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_created_at ON public.leads USING btree (created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_follow_up_date ON public.leads USING btree (follow_up_date)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_listing_id ON public.leads USING btree (listing_id) WHERE (listing_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_municipality_id ON public.leads USING btree (municipality_id) WHERE (municipality_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_neighbourhood_id ON public.leads USING btree (neighbourhood_id) WHERE (neighbourhood_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_quality ON public.leads USING btree (quality)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_source ON public.leads USING btree (source)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_status ON public.leads USING btree (status)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_tenant ON public.leads USING btree (tenant_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_tenant_agent ON public.leads USING btree (tenant_id, agent_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_tenant_email ON public.leads USING btree (tenant_id, contact_email)
CREATE INDEX idx_leads_user_id ON public.leads USING btree (user_id)
CREATE INDEX leads_area_manager_id_idx ON public.leads USING btree (area_manager_id) WHERE (area_manager_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX leads_manager_id_idx ON public.leads USING btree (manager_id) WHERE (manager_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX leads_pkey ON public.leads USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX leads_tenant_admin_id_idx ON public.leads USING btree (tenant_admin_id)
